title: Academic Scmns Honors Program
content:
SCMNS Honors Program
Morgan State University - School of Computer, Mathematical, and Natural Sciences

The Honors Program within the School of Computer, Mathematical, and Natural Sciences (SCMNS) offers an enhanced level of academic challenge and enrichment for academically distinguished students. Honors courses are designed to push students to perform at their highest potential, strengthening their critical thinking and independent learning skills. Additional program components focus on developing leadership skills and preparing students for future careers. Honors students receive specialized academic advising from the Honors Coordinator starting from their freshman year.

Honors Program Features:
- Priority registration
- Honors courses tailored for SCMNS Honors students
- Honors academic advising
- Community service opportunities
- Senior Honors thesis
- Social events
- Professional workshops
- Assistance in identifying internship opportunities
- Special opportunities within the Pre-Professional Programs office
- Support for competitive applications to postgraduate programs, professional schools, fellowships, and scholarships

Contact Information:

Associate Professor, Biology
